versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   postgresql-18-3-0               true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: postgresql
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: postgresql-18-3-0
      name: postgresql
      namespace: postgresql
      values: |
        postgresql:
          global:
            security:
              allowInsecureImages: true
          image:
            repository: bitnamilegacy/postgresql

versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   postgresql-16-7-21              true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: postgresql
spec:

      values: |

examples.title: With Ingress
examples.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install traefik oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=traefik:39.0.5" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install postgresql oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=postgresql:16.7.21" \
  -n kcm-system
examples.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   traefik-39-0-5                  true
# kcm-system   postgresql-16-7-21              true
examples.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: postgresql
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: traefik-39-0-5
      name: traefik
      namespace: postgresql
      values: |
        traefik:
          deployment:
            kind: DaemonSet
          ports:
            web:
              port: 8000
              hostPort: 80
            websecure:
              port: 8443
              hostPort: 443
            pg:
              port: 5432
              hostPort: 5432
    - template: postgresql-16-7-21
      name: postgresql
      namespace: postgresql
      values: |
        postgresql:
          global:
            security:
              allowInsecureImages: true
          image:
            repository: bitnamilegacy/postgresql
          auth:
            postgresPassword: pgpasswd
            username: user
            password: passwd
            database: pgdb
          readReplicas:
            replicaCount: 2
          extraDeploy:
          - apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
            kind: IngressRouteTCP
            metadata:
              name: pg
              namespace: postgresql
            spec:
              entryPoints:
                - pg
              routes:
                - match: HostSNI(*)
                  services:
                    - name: postgresql
                      port: 5432
examples.contentHtml:
Install template to k0rdent

helm upgrade --install traefik oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=traefik:39.0.5" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install postgresql oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=postgresql:16.7.21" \
  -n kcm-system

Verify service template

kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   traefik-39-0-5                  true
# kcm-system   postgresql-16-7-21              true

Deploy service template

apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: postgresql
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: traefik-39-0-5
      name: traefik
      namespace: postgresql
      values: |
        traefik:
          deployment:
            kind: DaemonSet
          ports:
            web:
              port: 8000
              hostPort: 80
            websecure:
              port: 8443
              hostPort: 443
            pg:
              port: 5432
              hostPort: 5432
    - template: postgresql-16-7-21
      name: postgresql
      namespace: postgresql
      values: |
        postgresql:
          global:
            security:
              allowInsecureImages: true
          image:
            repository: bitnamilegacy/postgresql
          auth:
            postgresPassword: pgpasswd
            username: user
            password: passwd
            database: pgdb
          readReplicas:
            replicaCount: 2
          extraDeploy:
          - apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
            kind: IngressRouteTCP
            metadata:
              name: pg
              namespace: postgresql
            spec:
              entryPoints:
                - pg
              routes:
                - match: HostSNI(*)
                  services:
                    - name: postgresql
                      port: 5432

Access database using 5432 port to read/write operations. 

PGPASSWORD=passwd psql -h <ip-or-address> -p 5432 -U user -d pgdb
